title: Tim Jonkers
extract: Tim Jonkers (born 3 July 1981) is a former Ireland international rugby league footballer who played as a second-row forward in the 1990s and 2000s. He played his club football with St Helens, with whom he had Challenge Cup and Super League grand final success, as well as the Wigan Warriors, Salford City Reds and Leigh Centurions. He also represented Lancashire.
